name: Future-proofing
intent: Add safety infrastructure (recursion depth guard) and deferred capabilities (context forking, async execution) required before Phase 6 nested workflow invocation can be unblocked. (pre-FGAP-026 planning artifact)

success_criteria.criterion: PI_WORKFLOW_MAX_DEPTH env var limits nested workflow invocation depth

specs.name: Workflow recursion depth guard
specs.intent: Prevent unbounded recursive workflow spawning via env-var depth tracking
